message:
fix(agent): persist assistant error messages to session history

Previously, assistant messages with error_message set were filtered out
during session persistence — the loop skipped them with `continue`,
meaning they never reached append_model_message(). This caused error
context to be lost on session reload: the agent would not know about
prior failures, and users reviewing session history would see gaps
where errors occurred.

Remove the error message filter so all assistant messages, including
those carrying errors, are persisted to the session file. Error messages
are legitimate conversation history and may contain diagnostic context
needed for debugging or retry decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
